title: Loader hardening — EXPORT_EXT literals and multi-module loading
purpose: The loader cannot load gleam@otp@actor.beam due to unsupported EXPORT_EXT (tag 113) in the LitT chunk. The CLI only loads single files. This brief adds EXPORT_EXT support and multi-module loading.
task: Add EXPORT_EXT decoding to the ETF literal decoder. Add --dir flag to CLI for multi-module loading.
boundaries: This brief SHALL NOT implement NEW_FUN_EXT (tag 112)
This brief SHALL NOT implement FUN_EXT (tag 117)
This brief SHALL NOT implement hot code loading or module versioning

requirements.title: EXPORT_EXT literal decoding
requirements.spec: The ETF decoder SHALL handle tag 113 (EXPORT_EXT) and any other ETF tags encountered in gleam_erlang and gleam_otp .beam files.

requirements.title: Multi-module loading in CLI
requirements.spec: CLI SHALL accept --dir flag to load all .beam files from a directory into the module registry.
acceptance: Cross-module imports resolve against loaded modules

requirements.title: Loading test with real gleam_otp modules
requirements.spec: Integration test SHALL verify all key gleam_otp .beam files load successfully.
acceptance: Test loads each module without load errors
Uses fixture .beam files from compiled gleam_otp
